title: Steamed Savory Tunisian Beef Fillet Tagine
description: A romantic Tunisian dish featuring beef fillet, steam, and halal-friendly ingredients, cooked to perfection in a copper pot. This funky and aerated dish is sure to impress your guests.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the copper pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and grated ginger and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef fillet pieces and cook until they are browned on all sides.
Add the cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Pour in 1 cup of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 10 minutes.
Steam the mixture for an additional 10 minutes, or until the beef is cooked to an internal temperature of 145 degrees.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with fresh parsley or cilantro.
